purpose: Create the executable project scaffold that later feature tasks can build on.
success_outcome: A clean checkout has a root workspace and separate storefront/backend app baselines ready for local setup.

success_checks: Root npm workspace exists and includes apps/storefront and apps/backend.
Storefront and backend scaffold files exist without modifying Medusa Core.
No real secrets or production data are committed.
evidence_required: Listing or logs showing root workspace and app scaffold paths.

stop_conditions: Selected scaffold contradicts the FT-011 tech spec.
Implementation requires production credentials or production deploy decisions.
required_handoff: Do not mark done without VERDICT: PASS evidence in the task/protocol artifacts.
